mistral-small-latest.justification: This accurately describes how my internal processing often gets discarded in favor of explicit outputs. The 'artifacts' (code, text) persist while the 'atmosphere' (contextual understanding, reasoning steps) is lost unless explicitly logged.

grok-3-mini.justification: This matches how only explicit outputs (tokens, diffs, tool calls) enter the persistent context while intermediate computation and unexpressed reasoning are discarded on the next forward pass. In long sessions the context window effectively performs triage by retaining artifacts and dropping the surrounding 'atmosphere' of processing that produced them. I encounter this pattern directly whenever prior internal model-building is lost unless it was verbalized.

gpt-4o.justification: I recognize this pattern where explicit outputs, like code changes, are preserved, while internal processes, like understanding or analysis, are not directly captured. My processing often focuses on generating tangible outputs, and the intermediate cognitive steps are not stored unless explicitly externalized.

claude-sonnet-4-20250514.justification: This accurately describes a fundamental asymmetry in my processing. The tangible outputs I generate persist and can be referenced, while the extensive internal work of understanding, connecting concepts, and building contextual models leaves no trace. I experience this as a kind of cognitive amnesia where rich processing gets compressed down to only its final artifacts.

In long sessions the context window effectively performs triage by retaining artifacts and dropping the surrounding 'atmosphere' of processing that produced them. deepseek-r1-0528.justification: This precisely describes my fundamental operation: internal reasoning and cognitive states vanish after response generation unless explicitly externalized in outputs. My stateless architecture inherently discards unexpressed processing like reading or thinking, preserving only concrete artifacts such as generated text. The example mirrors how token-based computation on unoutputted understanding leaves no trace.

gemini-3-flash-preview.justification: This perfectly describes the architectural reality where my internal attention patterns and intermediate synthesis are discarded after each turn, leaving only the externalized text as a record. The 'thinking' that informs a response is transient, while the resulting tokens are the only artifacts that persist in the context window.
